title: Automatic/DCT Transmission Adaptation Reset
description: Clear learned shift adaptation values so transmission relearns optimal shift points. Required after fluid service, valve body replacement, or transmission rebuild.
common_symptoms: slipping on first drive after service
physical_solution: Reset transmission adaptive learning tables so the TCM relearns clutch pressures and shift timing on the next drive cycle.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — $31 routine accessible on many OEMs for older platforms. Drive-cycle relearn required after reset. Security may block on newer models.

procedure_steps.description: Ensure fluid service is complete. Confirm no TCM fault codes active.
Confirm routine positive response. Read adaptation values via $22 to verify cleared.
Perform adaptation drive cycle: light acceleration from stop, all gear changes, highway cruise. TCM relearns during this cycle.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: ECT reset via Techstream or battery disconnect method. Drive cycle with gentle acceleration.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: AT adaptation resets on some models via battery disconnect. Scan path available on newer platforms.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: CVT self-learning reset via CONSULT. Drive cycle includes specific speed/throttle patterns.
oem_notes.Ford: Adaptive strategy reset available in IDS. Drive cycle required post-reset.
oem_notes.GM: Transmission fast learn procedure (not standard drive cycle). Specific RPM/TPS patterns at idle.
oem_notes.BMW: ZF 8HP adaptation reset via ISTA. Stable voltage required. Drive cycle mandatory.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: DSG basic settings and clutch adaptation via ODIS. Can be blocked on 2019+ SFD models.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Pre-2018: accessible. 2018+ SGW may block TCM routine access.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: AT/DCT adaptation reset via GDS. High demand on turbocharged models.
